content.en:
The Red Wolf Family.

The Red Wolf Family, which only has a Fourth Realm, can be regarded as the weakest overlord-level super-dimensional force, and the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord of the Red Wolf Family has almost always been in charge of the Red Wolf Family, so other overlord-level super-dimensional forces will not deliberately offend the Red Wolf Family.

Every extra-dimensional realm of the Red Wolf Family is proud of the Red Wolf Family, there are a large number of extra-dimensional realms here, and there are too many treasures of various resources.

And in the depths of the Red Wolf Family, there is a special treasure here, which was moved by the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord from a place, and he has also been sitting here for a long time.

This is also the safest place for the Red Wolf Family, and a large number of formations have been arranged.

Even if the other extradimensional realms of the fourth realm forcibly attacked here, it would not be easy to break through.

Ye Tian came to the vicinity of the Red Wolf Family, and after some investigation, he decided that it would be better to lure the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord out.

If it is a direct attack on the Red Wolf Family, then the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord may flee, or ask for help, it will not be easy to kill.

How to elicit it?

"Pretend to be a near-invincible extradimensional realm in the third realm, come and attack the Red Wolf family, loot a treasure house, and then quickly escape. In this way, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord will definitely chase and kill, and when he chases and kills, I will directly burst out with all my strength and kill him 243 in an instant!"

Ye Tian planned to do so.

......

Soon, Ye Tian disguised his identity and attacked the Red Wolf Family as a demon in the late stage of the Third Realm.

Somewhere in the family of red wolves.

After Ye Tian appeared, he shot directly.

Rumble!!!!

A devastating light came through the extradimensional void, shattering countless buildings and formations in an instant, and then grabbed a treasure trove with one hand, quickly snatching it away.

"Look for death!"

A strong man at the peak of the third realm of the Red Wolf Family appeared, and he was the Lord of the Wolf River Realm of the Red Wolf Family.

The Wolf River Realm Lord tried to intercept Ye Tian, but Ye Tian used a super-dimensional supernatural power to directly knock him away, and initially injured the other party.

Of course, this is Ye Tian's hidden strength to make a move, otherwise he can kill a mere third realm peak extradimensional realm with a wave of his hand.

After the Lord of the Wolf River Realm was injured, he did not stop tracking, and the other third realms of the Red Wolf Family appeared one after another, trying to intercept Ye Tian, but Ye Tian's speed was too fast, and these third realms couldn't stop it at all.

"Ancestor!"

One by one, the Third Realm shouted.

As the Dragon Wolf Realm Master of the Fourth Realm of the Red Wolf Family, he naturally knew about it for the first time, and seeing that these juniors of the Third Realm couldn't even intercept a guy from the late Third Realm, he couldn't help but scold: "What a waste, even the enemies of the late Third Realm have to be done by the Ancestor!"

Wow!

He stepped forward and intercepted in front of Ye Tian.

"Die!"

His power exploded, as if he wanted to crush Ye Tian with a thought.

In his opinion, with his cultivation in the Fourth Realm, wouldn't it be a matter of thought to kill a late stage of the Third Realm?

But in the next moment, he shivered all over, as if he was enveloped in great terror.

Despair!

Fear!

At this moment, he finally understood that this was a trap.

There is a fourth realm that wants to attack and kill him, deliberately luring him out.

His soul will searched around, looking for the Fourth Realm hidden in the shadows, but found nothing.

Then.

He suddenly discovered that the real crisis came from the late stage of the Third Realm in front of him.

But he was too late to retreat.

"Black Light Thorn!"

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord tried to dodge, but he couldn't, so he could only urge a super-dimensional Dao soldier on his body to defend.

Rumble!!!

His body was hit by the black light thorn, and the super super dimensional dao soldiers resisted the power of the black light thorn in thirty percent, and the remaining seventy percent of the black light thorn penetrated into his body, completely killing his soul will, and his body was also shattered.

Under one blow, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord fell.

Then, with a wave of his hand, Ye Tianyi took away the corpse of the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, and then quickly escaped.

......

Below.

A group of red wolf families were stunned in the third realm, and they couldn't believe it at all.

This is their fourth realm ancestor, and he was killed by a third realm (bgeb) in seconds.

"The Ancestor has fallen!"

"It's over, our Red Wolf Family is finished!"

Losing this only Fourth Realm Ancestor, the Red Wolf Family is equivalent to no Fourth Realm in charge, and completely fell from the overlord-level super-dimensional power, although it will not be destroyed, but its strength has plummeted, and many resources are not to be saved.

And the red wolf family has always had a bad reputation, and it is because of the protection of the dragon and wolf realm master, so they are safe.

But now, there will definitely be a lot of forces that will attack them, and there will be a lot of troubles in the future!

Soon.

There was a fourth realm to investigate the situation, but Ye Tian could not be tracked down.

However, they were sure that the one who attacked and killed the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord was definitely the guy who snatched a multi-dimensional treasure from the withered vine forest sea, and only that third realm had the potential to kill the fourth realm, and the other party must have made a big breakthrough, otherwise he would not be able to kill the dragon wolf realm master in seconds.

......

Jiucai Chamber of Commerce.

The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm and the Lord of the Duogu Realm also heard that the Lord of the Dragon Wolf Realm had been killed, although the Lord of the Dragon Wolf Realm was only a weak Fourth Realm who had cultivated in the early stage of the Fourth Realm, but it was also the Fourth Realm!

The fourth realm is not easy to fall, let alone kill in seconds.

The extra-dimensional realm in the late stage of the fourth realm may not be able to severely damage the super-dimensional realm in the early stage of the fourth realm with one move.

Of course, if the Lord of the Six Shadows Realm wants to kill the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord in seconds, he can do it, but he is a super-dimensional realm with the peak cultivation of the fourth realm, while the attacker is a guy in the late stage of the third realm.

"The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm, this third realm should be the third realm that escaped from us at the beginning, the other party is very mysterious, and it can't be traced, and he snatched a multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and now it seems that he used the multi-dimensional treasure gourd to condense a lot of multi-dimensional treasure essence, so that the innate multi-dimensional Dao body broke through, maybe he stepped into the second layer, and then there was hope to kill the dragon and wolf realm lord in seconds!"

"What is that guy's identity, but the third realm has such strength!"

"I couldn't find out my identity, and at first I suspected that the other party was from the Tianjia clan, but the Tianjia clan was only powerful in the Great Realm armor, but its strength was not strong, and it was impossible to cultivate such a demonic third realm. "

"That's right, it can't be the Tianjia clan, but it's not from the third realm of small forces, the other party has obtained the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, if there are not enough special resources, it will not be able to condense a large amount of multi-dimensional treasure essence in a short period of time. We don't have any special resources here in Territory 500, except in Territory 4000. "

"Lord of the Six Shadows Realm, are you saying that guy is from the side of the Four Thousand Realm? It's unlikely, how can the Third Realm come from that side and can't break through the boundary extradimensional barrier!"

"Maybe there is movement in a weak point, or some special means, you can come over. These endless years are not without a third realm. "

"Forget it, I can't find the other party, there's no need to track it down!"

Such conversations were going on all over the Five Thousand Territory, but none of them could find Ye Tian, so naturally they didn't continue to track it down.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian came to a safe place and began to collect the treasures on the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord.
